title: cineraria alliarifolia
intro: Cineraria alliarifolia, also known as the Cape Marigold, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Cineraria alliarifolia lie in its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Cineraria alliarifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
